name: Earth Spirit
description: Through conflict, one's nature is revealed.

20.left: x1.75 Rolling Boulder Strength to Damage

abilities.name: Stone Remnant
abilities.description: Self-targeting the ability places the Stone Remnant within melee range. The ability passively grants Kaolin attack damage bonus per unused charge. Additionally, grants a greater unstackable attack damage bonus buff whenever Kaolin targets a Stone Remnant with an ability (does not stack). Cast Range: 1100. Remnant Duration: 60. Stone Distance: 100. Attack Damage Bonus per Charge: 2.5%. Attack Damage Bonus: 7.5%. Buff Duration: 10. Cooldown: 0.

abilities.name: Boulder Smash
abilities.description: Smashes the target enemy or allied unit, sending them in the direction he is facing. The traveling unit damages all enemy units it hits. Cast Range: 150. Effect Radius: 180. Damage: 110/180/250/320 (190/260/330/400). Push Distance: 500/600/700/800. Target Search Radius: 200. Stone Push Distance: 2000. Cooldown: 20/17/14/11. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Rolling Boulder
abilities.description: Gathers himself into a boulder and rolls toward the target location after a slight delay, deals damage and stuns enemy units. Earth Spirit will stop if he collides with an enemy hero or when being disabled. Cast Range: 3000. Collision Radius: 160. Effect Radius: 160. Roll Distance: 800 (950). Base Damage: 60/70/80/90. Str as Damage Factor: 1 (2.75). Cooldown: 16/12/8/4. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Geomagnetic Grip
abilities.description: Pulls the targeted allied or enemy unit. Enemy units struck by the pulled target will be silenced. Increases both the ally pull speed and ally cast range. Reduces cooldown. Cast Range: 1000/1100/1200/1300. Effect Radius: 180. Pull Speed: 600. Silence Duration: 2.3/2.7/3.1/3.5. Stone Pull Speed: 900. Damage: 75/150/225/300 (325/400/475/550). Cooldown: 13 (10). Mana Cost: 75.

abilities.name: Enchant Remnant
abilities.description: Can be cast on Stone Remnants, and has a lower cooldown when used that way. The Stone Remnant cannot expire while being Enchanted. However, it is immediately destroyed once the Enchantment expires. Cast Range: 175. Damage Radius: 450. Damage: 450. Enchant Duration: 2.4. Ally Cast Range: 500. Stone Cast Cooldown: 5. Cooldown: 45. Mana Cost: 150.

abilities.name: Magnetize
abilities.description: Magnetizes enemy units in a small nearby area, causing them to take damage for a short duration. Magnetized heroes cause nearby Stone Remnants to explode, destroying the remnant and refreshing Magnetize's duration on all nearby enemies. This process can repeat multiple times. Effect Radius: 350. Stone Search Radius: 600. Stone Refresh Radius: 600. Damage per Second: 45/90/135 (58.5/117/175.5). Magnetize Duration: 6 (7.8). Stone Duration Delay: 8. Cooldown: 100/90/80. Mana Cost: 100.
